formulas.verifiedCase: terminal && schemaValid && hardPolicyViolations == 0 && criticalGoalCoverage == 1 && nonCriticalGoalCoverage >= max(0.8, caseMinimum) && (!requiresSkill || includedSkillCount >= 1) && everyDiscoveryPromotionHasVisibleOverride

denominatorRules.verifiedCoverage: Every frozen in-scope case remains in the denominator. Crash, timeout, malformed, missing, empty, and partial-invalid results fail.
denominatorRules.inclusionPrecision: Empty stacks have null precision and are counted explicitly; they fail verified coverage. Precision reports nonEmptyStackCount and emptyStackCount.
denominatorRules.abstention: Only the separately frozen abstention set is used. Cases cannot be relabeled after results are observed.
denominatorRules.macro: Per-intent gates and the unweighted six-intent macro gate must all pass. Micro-only aggregation is forbidden.
